Medical associate professions
Medical associate professions
Medical associate professions (MAPs) include physician associates, anaesthesia associates, and surgical care practitioners. They are trained healthcare professionals who provide patient care under supervision. MAPs work in multidisciplinary teams with doctors, nurses, and other healthcare workers.
Anaesthesia associate
Physician associate
